report.summary: UX audit of tool pages: fixed missing Breadcrumb navigation on 2 pages, added OG image metadata to 8 pages, improved accessibility with aria-labels and focus ring styles on DEX Screener.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DEX Screener: Added Breadcrumb component (was missing entirely)
DEX Screener: Added aria-labels to search input and range sliders
DEX Screener: Added focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 to search input for keyboard accessibility
DEX Screener: Added aria-hidden to decorative Zap icon
Sentiment Dashboard: Replaced inline nav breadcrumb with standard Breadcrumb component for consistency
Token Compare: Identified as using non-standard inline breadcrumb (flagged for next cycle)
Degen Score: Identified as missing breadcrumb entirely (flagged for next cycle)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image metadata: DEX Screener (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Sentiment Dashboard (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Airdrop Eligibility Checker (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Portfolio Analytics (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Portfolio Heatmap (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Whale Alert Tracker (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Performance Dashboard (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image metadata: Bridge Aggregator v2 (1200x630 via /api/og)

sections.title: SEO Metadata Standardization
items: Added canonical URLs to all 8 updated pages
Standardized title format to 'Page Name | degen0x' across all updated layouts
Added alternates.canonical to prevent duplicate content issues
Imported SITE_NAME and SITE_URL constants for consistency

next_cycle_backlog: Standardize Token Compare breadcrumb to use Breadcrumb component
Add Breadcrumb to Degen Score page
Audit remaining learn/ pages for OG image gaps
Add prefers-reduced-motion checks to Sentiment Dashboard animations
